summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the new import feature with duplicate detection and resolution. Backend APIs (15/15 tests passed) and frontend UI flows are working correctly. All major features tested including file upload, preview, duplicate detection, side-by-side comparison, action buttons (Skip/Overwrite/Import Anyway/Merge), bulk actions, and Done summary screen.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/leads/import/preview - Preview CSV file with column mapping
Backend: POST /api/leads/import/preview - Returns unmapped columns
Backend: POST /api/leads/import/analyze - Detect duplicates in CSV
Backend: POST /api/leads/import/analyze - No duplicates found path
Backend: POST /api/leads/import/analyze - Handle rows with errors (missing company name)
Backend: POST /api/leads/import/batch - Import pre-parsed leads
Backend: POST /api/leads/import/batch - Empty leads list
Backend: POST /api/leads/import/resolve - Skip action
Backend: POST /api/leads/import/resolve - Overwrite action with data verification
Backend: POST /api/leads/import/resolve - Import Anyway action (creates duplicate with isDuplicate=true)
Backend: POST /api/leads/import/resolve - Merge action (combines data from both leads)
Backend: POST /api/leads/import/resolve - Mixed actions in single request
Backend: POST /api/leads/import - Legacy import still works (auto-skips duplicates)
Backend: POST /api/leads/import/analyze - Invalid file format handling
Backend: POST /api/leads/import/resolve - Invalid existing ID error handling
Frontend: Import modal opens from All Leads Table page
Frontend: File upload via drag-drop area and browse link
Frontend: Preview shows file name, row count, column mapping
Frontend: Confirm Import button triggers analysis with 'Analyzing' spinner
Frontend: No duplicates path - goes straight to Done screen with import count
Frontend: Duplicates found - shows Duplicate Review screen
Frontend: Side-by-side comparison (Incoming vs Existing) with field differences highlighted
Frontend: Action buttons (Skip, Overwrite, Import Anyway, Merge) on each duplicate row
Frontend: Match reason displayed (e.g., 'Match: phone matches phone')
Frontend: 'Apply to all remaining' checkbox works
Frontend: Bulk action dropdown with all 4 options
Frontend: Non-duplicate count shown in blue bar at top of review screen
Frontend: Summary counter at bottom (X skip, X overwrite, X import anyway, X merge)
Frontend: Confirm Import button on review screen resolves duplicates
Frontend: Done screen shows 6 stat cards (Imported Fresh, Skipped, Overwritten, Merged, Import Anyway, Errors)
Frontend: Done button closes modal and refreshes leads list
context_for_next_testing_agent: The import feature has been completely rewritten. Key endpoints: /api/leads/import/analyze (returns nonDuplicates, duplicates, errors), /api/leads/import/batch (imports array of leads), /api/leads/import/resolve (processes duplicate resolutions with actions: skip, overwrite, import_anyway, merge). The frontend ImportModal.jsx has steps: upload, preview, analyzing, duplicateReview, done. Test data-testids: import-file-input, confirm-import-btn, dup-{n}-action-{action}, apply-all-checkbox, bulk-action-select, resolve-confirm-btn, stat-{label}, import-done-btn.
